Bar chart of average GDP growth by year

args.sql:
SELECT 
  strftime('%Y', quarter) as year,
  AVG(gdp_growth_pct) as avg_gdp_growth
FROM us_quarterly_macro_0047798b
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year

messages.content:
# bar_chart
Vertical, horizontal, diverging, and stacked bar charts for category comparison

# Bar Charts — Templates

≤7 categories → vertical; >7 or long labels → horizontal. NEVER `.interactive()`. ALWAYS `gs_theme()` + `save_artifact()`.

## A — Vertical Bar (≤7 categories)
```python
import altair as alt
df = _db.execute("SELECT category, value FROM your_table ORDER BY value DESC").df()
chart = alt.Chart(df).mark_bar(
    cornerRadiusTopLeft=BAR_CORNER_RADIUS, cornerRadiusTopRight=BAR_CORNER_RADIUS,
    color=PRIMARY, opacity=BAR_OPACITY,
).encode(
    x=alt.X('category:N', sort=None, axis=alt.Axis(title=None, labelAngle=-30)),
    y=alt.Y('value:Q', axis=alt.Axis(title='Value')),
    tooltip=[alt.Tooltip('category:N', title='Category'),
             alt.Tooltip('value:Q', title='Value', format=',.1f')]
)
chart = gs_theme(chart, "Category Comparison")
save_artifact(chart, "Category Comparison")
```
Label angles: 0° (≤5 cats), -30° (6-10), switch to horizontal for 10+.

## B — Horizontal Bar (>7 categories or long labels)
```python
import altair as alt
df = _db.execute("SELECT category, value FROM your_table ORDER BY value DESC").df()
row_height = max(300, len(df) * 28)
chart = alt.Chart(df).mark_bar(
    cornerRadiusTopRight=BAR_CORNER_RADIUS, cornerRadiusBottomRight=BAR_CORNER_RADIUS,
    color=PRIMARY, opacity=BAR_OPACITY,
).encode(
    y=alt.Y('category:N', sort=None, axis=alt.Axis(title=None)),
    x=alt.X('value:Q', axis=alt.Axis(title='Value')),
    tooltip=[alt.Tooltip('category:N', title='Category'),
             alt.Tooltip('value:Q', title='Value', format=',.1f')]
)
chart = gs_theme(chart, "Ranking", width=W_STANDARD, height=row_height)
save_artifact(chart, "Ranking")
```

## C — Diverging Bar (positive & negative values)
```python
import altair as alt
df = _db.execute("SELECT period, change_pct FROM your_table ORDER BY period").df()
df['_color'] = df['change_pct'].apply(lambda v: POSITIVE if v >= 0 else NEGATIVE)
chart = alt.Chart(df).mark_bar(
    cornerRadiusTopLeft=BAR_CORNER_RADIUS, cornerRadiusTopRight=BAR_CORNER_RADIUS,
    opacity=BAR_OPACITY,
).encode(
    x=alt.X('period:O', axis=alt.Axis(title=None, labelAngle=-30)),
    y=alt.Y('change_pct:Q', axis=alt.Axis(title='Change (%)')),
    color=alt.Color('_color:N', scale=None, legend=None),
    tooltip=[alt.Tooltip('period:O', title='Period'),
             alt.Tooltip('change_pct:Q', title='Change', format='+,.2f')]
)
rule = alt.Chart({'values': [{'y': 0}]}).mark_rule(color=NEUTRAL, strokeWidth=1).encode(y='y:Q')
chart = gs_theme(chart + rule, "Annual Returns")
save_artifact(chart, "Annual Returns")
```

## D — Stacked Bar (proportional comparison)
```python
import altair as alt
df = _db.execute("SELECT period, segment, value FROM your_table ORDER BY period").df()
n_segments = df['segment'].nunique()
chart = alt.Chart(df).mark_bar(opacity=BAR_OPACITY).encode(
    x=alt.X('period:O', axis=alt.Axis(title=None, labelAngle=-30)),
    y=alt.Y('value:Q', stack='normalize', axis=alt.Axis(title='Share (%)', format='.0%')),
    color=alt.Color('segment:N', scale=alt.Scale(range=CAT_PALETTE[:n_segments]),
                     legend=alt.Legend(title=None, orient='bottom')),
    tooltip=[alt.Tooltip('period:O', title='Period'),
             alt.Tooltip('segment:N', title='Segment'),
             alt.Tooltip('value:Q', title='Value', format=',.1f')]
)
chart = gs_theme(chart, "Segment Breakdown")
save_artifact(chart, "Segment Breakdown")
```
For absolute stacked: `stack=True` and `format=',.0f'` on Y axis.

## Decision: ≤7 short→A, >7/long→B, crosses zero→C, breakdown per group→D, single-group part-of-whole→donut_chart.

Pre-imported: `gs_theme`, `save_artifact`, `PRIMARY`, `CAT_PALETTE`, `_db`. Use `:Q` for numbers, `:N` for categories, `:T` for dates only.
